hints.description: This global food processing and commodities trading corporation sources, transports, and processes agricultural products. They transform oilseeds, corn, wheat, and other raw materials into ingredients for food and beverage manufacturers, as well as animal feed and industrial products like ethanol. Founded in 1902, the company plays a critical role in the global food supply chain and is led by CEO Juan Luciano.
hints.funFact1: In 1924, the company changed its name from ***** to reflect its expanded operations beyond just soybean processing, incorporating "Midland" to signify its reach across the Midwest.
hints.funFact2: The company once held the world record for the largest single shipment of grain, transporting over 30 million bushels of wheat in 1974 – a logistical feat demonstrating its extensive transportation network.
